title: Christopher J Waller: Modernising Federal Reserve operations in the 21st century
body:
Speech by Mr Christopher J Waller, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Brookings Institution, Washington DC, 21 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260422k.htm

title: Sarah Breeden: This time is different?
body:
Speech by Ms Sarah Breeden, Deputy Governor for Financial Stability of the Bank of England, at the Harvard Law School (HLS)-The Program on International Financial Systems (PIFS) Symposium "Building the financial system of the 21st century: an agenda for Europe and the United States", London, 17 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260422a.htm

title: Christopher J Waller: One transitory shock after another
body:
Text of the David Kaserman Memorial Lecture by Mr Christopher J Waller, Member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, Department of Economics, Auburn University, Auburn, Alabama, 17 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260420f.htm

title: John C Williams: The cosmos
body:
Remarks by Mr John C Williams, President and Chief Executive Officer of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, at the Federal Home Loan Bank of New York 2026 Member Symposium, New York City, 16 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260420e.htm

title: Piero Cipollone: Sparking the transformation of finance - tokenisation and the role of central banks
body:
Keynote address by Mr Piero Cipollone, Member of the Executive Board of the European Central Bank, at the 24th Annual Symposium "Building the financial system of the 21st century: an agenda for Europe and the United States", hosted by the Harvard Law School and the Program on International Financial Systems, Washington DC, 15 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416k.htm
